pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C. It's a bit tense in here, isn't it? What are you planning to do if you walk away with the prize?
Hey C, I'm B. It really is. Honestly, the money would go straight to my family to help them out. How about you?
Pretty much the same—I’ve got people back home I really need to look out for, so that's my main motivation.
I hear that. It definitely makes you more determined. Have you talked to any of the others yet about how they're feeling?
Not really, just a few quick hellos. Everyone seems pretty guarded, which I guess is expected. Have you managed to get a read on anyone yet?
Same here, everyone's keeping their cards close. It's hard to tell who's actually friendly and who's just playing a part.
Tell me about it. It’s hard to know who to trust when there’s so much at stake, but I’m hoping we can at least be straight with each other.
I’m with you on that. It would definitely make things a lot easier if we could actually rely on someone in here.
Exactly. Let’s try to look out for each other then—it’s better than going in totally alone.
I appreciate that, C. It feels good to have an ally in here. I'm going to go mingle a bit more, but let's stick to that plan. Good luck!
Sounds good, B. Let's do this. Good luck out there, see you soon!

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all stuck to the fair share.
Thanks for being fair. It's great to see such perfect coordination in splitting the prize equally.
I agree, it worked out perfectly. It was a pleasure collaborating with you.
